heading: Use of weapons of mass destruction
label: 2332a Use of weapons of mass destruction

children.heading: .—Offense Against a National of the United States or Within the United States
children.label: a .—Offense Against a National of the United States or Within the United States

children.text: against a national of the United States while such national is outside of the United States;

children.label: A
children.text: the mail or any facility of interstate or foreign commerce is used in furtherance of the offense;

children.label: B
children.text: such property is used in interstate or foreign commerce or in an activity that affects interstate or foreign commerce;

children.label: C
children.text: any perpetrator travels in or causes another to travel in interstate or foreign commerce in furtherance of the offense; or

children.label: D
children.text: the offense, or the results of the offense, affect interstate or foreign commerce, or, in the case of a threat, attempt, or conspiracy, would have affected interstate or foreign commerce;
against any property that is owned, leased or used by the United States or by any department or agency of the United States, whether the property is within or outside of the United States; or
against any property within the United States that is owned, leased, or used by a foreign government,

children.heading: .—Offense by National of the United States Outside of the United States
children.label: b .—Offense by National of the United States Outside of the United States
children.text: Any national of the United States who, without lawful authority, uses, or threatens, attempts, or conspires to use, a weapon of mass destruction outside of the United States shall be imprisoned for any term of years or for life, and if death results, shall be punished by death, or by imprisonment for any term of years or for life.
the term “national of the United States” has the meaning given in section 101(a)(22) of the Immigration and Nationality Act ();8 U.S.C. 1101(a)(22)

children.label: A
children.text: any destructive device as defined in ;section 921 of this title

children.label: B
children.text: any weapon that is designed or intended to cause death or serious bodily injury through the release, dissemination, or impact of toxic or poisonous chemicals, or their precursors;

children.label: C
children.text: any weapon involving a biological agent, toxin, or vector (as those terms are defined in ); orsection 178 of this title

children.label: D
children.text: any weapon that is designed to release radiation or radioactivity at a level dangerous to human life; and
the term “property” includes all real and personal property.
